title: tridens congestus
intro: Tridens congestus, also known as Black Needle Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the prairies and open woods of the central and western regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Tridens congestus is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating respiratory issues, including coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, as well as being used to make salves and liniments for topical application.
